newsletter_markdown.description: Free-form final newsletter Markdown, except that the Best chatter and Worst chatter sections are represented by exactly one <!-- CHATTER_AWARDS --> placeholder. Do not include an all-time leaderboard or nick-alias footer.

nick.description: Plain IRC nickname only, with no Markdown formatting.

reason.description: One-line newsletter prose explaining the award, in the required newsletter voice. Do not repeat the section label or nickname.
